column3: AC-Glutathione™ delivers acetylated glutathione — a stable, orally bioavailable form that resists breakdown in the digestive tract. Unlike reduced glutathione, acetyl-glutathione crosses cell membranes and the blood-brain barrier to replenish intracellular antioxidant reserves. Supports neurological health, Phase 2 liver detoxification, immune defense, and protection against oxidative stress throughout the body.

column41: AC-Glutathione™ delivers acetylated glutathione — a stable, orally bioavailable form that resists breakdown in the digestive tract.
column46:
Key Benefits

  • Replenishes intracellular glutathione more effectively than standard oral glutathione
  • Crosses the blood-brain barrier to support neurological antioxidant defense
  • Supports Phase 2 liver detoxification pathways
  • Protects cells from oxidative damage and supports immune function
  • Stable acetylated form resists GI degradation

How to Use

Take as directed by your healthcare practitioner, typically 1–2 capsules daily with or without food. For enhanced absorption, take on an empty stomach.

Why NeuroSolution Recommends This

Glutathione depletion is a common finding in neurological conditions and chronic illness. column47: This formula provides S-acetyl-L-glutathione — a stable, membrane-permeable form of glutathione — which upon entering cells is converted to reduced glutathione (GSH), the body's master antioxidant. Unlike standard reduced glutathione supplements that break down in the GI tract, the acetyl group protects the molecule through digestion and facilitates intracellular and blood-brain barrier penetration.
